name: Robot Singularity Mapping and Dexterity Analysis
description: A robotics engineer is designing motion plans for a new assembly cell. Before programming trajectories, the engineer must identify singularity regions where the robot loses degrees of freedom, causing unpredictable or uncontrollable motion. Characterize the dexterity of a 6-DOF robot arm in the 'messaging/movementViaRemoteApi.ttt' scene using the ZMQ Remote API by computing the numerical Jacobian and manipulability index across at least 50 diverse joint configurations (varying at least 2 joints by ≥ 30°). For each configuration, calculate the Manipulability index (sqrt(det(J @ J.T))) and the Jacobian condition number. Export the detailed results to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/dexterity_samples.csv with columns: sample_id, j0_
